## Phase 3 Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Frontend unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Frontend E2E tests pass locally
- [ ] Backend unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Backend integration tests pass locally (includes stress/robustness)
- [ ] CI is green on this PR
- [ ] No secrets or API keys are committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior/config changed)
- [ ] At least 2 approvals received before merge
